---
title: "FinalProject"
output: html_document
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---
```{r question geartypes}
library(tidyverse)
library(ggplot2)

geartypes<-read.csv("~/GitHub/ESP106FinalProject/fish-catch-gear-type.csv")
geartypesdf<-data.frame(geartypes)
wrldgear<-filter(geartypesdf,Entity=="World")

wide_data<- data.frame(Year=wrldgear$Year,Unknown.Gear=wrldgear$Unknown.gear,other.gear=wrldgear$Other.gear,longline=wrldgear$Longline,gillnet=wrldgear$Gillnet,small.scale=wrldgear$Small.scale,purse.seine=wrldgear$Purse.seine,pelagic.trawl=wrldgear$Pelagic.trawl,bottom.trawl=wrldgear$Bottom.trawl)

wrldgear.long<-wide_data %>%
  filter(Year >= 1974 & Year <= 2018) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols=c(Unknown.Gear,other.gear,longline,gillnet,small.scale,purse.seine,pelagic.trawl,bottom.trawl),
               names_to = "Gear.Type",values_to = "Count")
 ggplot(wrldgear.long,aes(
   x=Year,y=Count,fill=Gear.Type)) + 
   geom_area(position= "fill") + 
   labs(
     title="Fish Catch by Gear Type over time", 
     y= "Proportions", fill= " Gear Type") + 
   xlim(1974,2018) + 
   scale_fill_discrete(name="Gear Type", labels= c("Bottom Trawl", "Gillnet"," Longline", "Other Gear", "Pelagic Trawl", "Purse Seine", "Small Scale", "Unknown Gear"))
```

```{r questionbiologically sustianable}
library(tidyverse)
library(ggplot2)

stock_sust <- read.csv("~/GitHub/ESP106FinalProject/fish-stocks-within-sustainable-levels.csv")
stock_sustdf <- data.frame(stock_sust)
wrld_sust <- filter(stock_sustdf, Entity == "World")%>% 
  filter(Year >= 1974 & Year <= 2018)

wrld_sust_long <- wrld_sust %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = c(Overexploited, Biologically.sustainable),
    names_to = "Status",
    values_to = "Value"
  )

ggplot(wrld_sust_long,
       aes(x = Year, y = Value, fill = Status)) +
  geom_area(position = "fill") +
  labs(
    title = "Sustainable vs. Overexploited Fish Stocks Worldwide",
    fill = "Status"
  ) +
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(1974, 2018))
```

```{r question data wrangling}
fractions<- wrldgear.long %>%
  group_by(Year)%>%
  mutate(Proportion= Count/sum(Count, na.rm=TRUE)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  select(-Count)%>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = "Gear.Type", values_from = "Proportion")

##df_range <- wrldgear.long %>%
  ##filter(year(Year) >= 2015 & year(Year) <= 2018)crop

fractions<-fractions[25:69,]

wrldsust2<-wrld_sust[1:45,]

fractions$Biologically.Sustainable<- wrldsust2$Biologically.sustainable

colnames(fractions)<- c("Year", "Unknown Gear", "Other Gear", "Longline", "Gillnet","Small Scale", "Purse Seine", "Pelagic Trawl", "Bottom Trawl", "Biologically Sustainable")
```

```{r question regression for each gear type}
response_var<-names(fractions)[ncol(fractions)]

fractions.for.plot<- fractions %>%
  pivot_longer( cols= -c( Year, all_of(response_var)), names_to = "Predictor", values_to= "Value") %>%
  ggplot(aes(
    x= Value, y= .data[[response_var]])) + 
  geom_point(alpha= 0.5) + geom_smooth(method="lm", se= TRUE, color="black") + facet_wrap(~Predictor, scales= "free_x") + 
  labs(
    x= "Predictor Value", 
    y= response_var, 
    title= "Regression of Each Gear Type Against Proportion of Fish Stocks Classified as Biologically Sustainable") +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(size=7.5), plot.margin = margin(15,5,10,10 ), axis.text.x = element_text(angle=90, vjust=1, hjust=1, size=5))

print(fractions.for.plot)
```

```{r question chi-squared test fr independence}
#install.packages("dplyr")
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)

fractions_long <- fractions %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = c(Year, "Biologically Sustainable"),
    names_to = "Gear.Type",
    values_to = "Proportion"
    )

fractions_long <- fractions_long %>%
  mutate(
    Sustainability = ifelse("Biologically Sustainable" > 0.5,
                            "Sustainable",
                            "Overexploited"))
contingency_table <- table(fractions_long$Gear.Type,
                           fractions_long$Sustainability)
chi_square_test <- chisq.test(contingency_table)
print(chi_square_test)

#plot chi test
library(ggstatsplot)

ggbarstats(
  data = fractions_long,
  x = "Sustainability",
  y = "Gear.Type"
) +
  labs(caption = NULL) 

```

```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)

fractions_long <- fractions %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = -c(Year, `Biologically Sustainable`),
    names_to = "Gear.Type",
    values_to = "Proportion"
  )

fractions_long <- fractions_long %>%
  mutate(
    Sustainability = ifelse(`Biologically Sustainable` > 0.5,
                            "Sustainable",
                            "Overexploited")
  )

contingency_table <- table(fractions_long$Gear.Type,
                           fractions_long$Sustainability)

chi_square_test <- chisq.test(contingency_table)

print(chi_square_test)

#plot chi test
library(ggstatsplot)

ggbarstats(
  data = fractions_long,
  x = Sustainability,
  y = Gear.Type
) +
  labs(caption = NULL)
```
